summary: Tested Distributor-to-Account Delivery module. Backend APIs all passing (13/13 tests). Frontend UI working correctly - login, navigation, deliveries tab, record delivery dialog, delivery detail view all functional.

bugs_fixed.issue: Was querying wrong collection 'account_distributor_mapping' instead of 'account_distributor_assignments'
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed collection name in routes/distributors.py line ~2437

critical_code_review_comments: Margin column in delivery detail shows '-' when no margin matrix is configured - this is expected behavior but could show 'N/A' or 'Not configured' for clarity
seed_data_creation: Created test deliveries via API tests - DEL-2026-0001 (confirmed), DEL-2026-0002 (delivered), DEL-2026-0003 (cancelled)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Delivery module fully functional. Backend bug fixed (wrong collection name for assigned accounts). All delivery statuses (draft, confirmed, delivered, cancelled) working. Margin calculation shows '-' when no margin matrix configured.

frontend_ui_flows: Navigate to distributor detail page - WORKING
Deliveries tab showing list with statuses - WORKING
Account dropdown shows assigned accounts - WORKING (after bug fix)
SKU selection and price calculation - WORKING
Delivery detail view with items and margin - WORKING
